endpoints.name: Get API Isage
endpoints.description: Returns prediction usage on a monthly basis for the current calendar month and future months. Each apiusage object in the response corresponds to a calendar month in your plan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get All Datasets
endpoints.description: Returns a list of datasets and their labels that were created by the current user. The response is sorted by dataset ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a Dataset From a File Asynchronously
endpoints.description: Creates a dataset, labels, and examples from the specified .csv, .tsv, or .json file. The call returns immediately and continues to upload data in the background.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a Dataset From a File Synchronously
endpoints.description: Creates a dataset, labels, and examples from the specified .csv, .tsv, or .json file. The call returns after the dataset is created and all of the data is uploaded.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get a Dataset
endpoints.description: Returns a single dataset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Delete a Dataset
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified dataset and associated labels and examples.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Get All Examples
endpoints.description: Returns all the examples for the specified dataset,
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Get All Models
endpoints.description: Returns all models for the specified dataset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Create Examples From a File
endpoints.description: Adds examples from a .csv, .tsv, or .json file to a dataset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Get Deletion Status
endpoints.description: Returns the status of a language dataset or model deletion. When you delete a dataset or model, the deletion may not occur immediately. Use this call to find out when the deletion is complete.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get All Examples for Label
endpoints.description: Returns all the examples for the specified label. Returns both uploaded examples and feedback examples.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a Feedback Example
endpoints.description: Adds a feedback example to the dataset associated with the specified model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Prediction for Intent
endpoints.description: Returns an intent prediction for the given string.

body.document: I can't tell you how much fun it was

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Model Metrics
endpoints.description: Returns the metrics for a model
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{MODELID}} with a real modelid.

endpoints.name: Delete a Model
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{MODELID}} with a real modelid.

endpoints.name: Get Model Learning Curve
endpoints.description: Returns the metrics for each epoch in a model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{MODELID}} with a real modelid.

endpoints.name: Retrain a Dataset
endpoints.description: Retrains a dataset and updates a model. Use this API call when you want to update a model and keep the model ID instead of creating a new model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Prediction for Sentiment
endpoints.description: Returns a sentiment prediction for the given string.

body.document: I can't tell you how much fun it was

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Train a Dataset
endpoints.description: Trains a dataset and creates a model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Training Status
endpoints.description: Returns the status of a model's training process. Use the progress field to determine how far the training has progressed. When training completes successfully, the status is SUCCEEDED and the progress is 1.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{MODELID}} with a real modelid.

endpoints.name: Generate an OAuth Token
endpoints.description: Returns an OAuth access token or a refresh token. You must pass a valid access token in the header of each API call.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Delete a Refresh Token
endpoints.description: Delete a Refresh Token
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: Create Feedback Examples From a Zip File
endpoints.description: Adds feedback examples to the dataset associated with the specified object detection model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get All Datasets
endpoints.description: Returns a list of datasets and their labels that were created by the current user. The response is sorted by dataset ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a Dataset
endpoints.description: Creates a dataset and labels, if they're specified.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a Dataset From a Zip File Asynchronously
endpoints.description: Creates a dataset, labels, and examples from the specified .zip file. The call returns immediately and continues to upload the images in the background.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a Dataset From a Zip File Synchronously
endpoints.description: Creates a dataset, labels, and examples from the specified .zip file. The call returns after the dataset is created and all of the images are uploaded.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get a Dataset
endpoints.description: Returns a single dataset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Delete a Dataset
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified dataset and associated labels and examples.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Get All Examples
endpoints.description: Returns all the examples for the specified dataset. By default, returns examples created by uploading them from a .zip file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Create an Example
endpoints.description: Adds an example with the specified label to a dataset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Get All Models
endpoints.description: Returns all models for the specified dataset.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Create Examples From a Zip File
endpoints.description: Adds examples from a .zip file to a dataset. You can use this call only with a dataset that was created from a .zip file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{DATASETID}} with a real datasetid.

endpoints.name: Get Deletion Status
endpoints.description: Returns the status of an image dataset or model deletion. When you delete a dataset or model, the deletion may not occur immediately. Use this call to find out when the deletion is complete.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Detection with Image File
endpoints.description: Returns labels, probabilities, and bounding box coordinates for items detected in the specified local image file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get All Examples for Label
endpoints.description: Returns all the examples for the specified label. Returns both uploaded examples and feedback examples.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a Feedback Example
endpoints.description: Adds a feedback example to the dataset associated with the specified model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.description: Returns the metrics for a model
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{MODELID}} with a real modelid.

endpoints.description: Deletes the specified model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{MODELID}} with a real modelid.

endpoints.name: Get Model Learning Curve
endpoints.description: Returns the metrics for each epoch in a model.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{MODELID}} with a real modelid.

endpoints.name: Detect Text
endpoints.description: Returns a prediction from an OCR model for the specified image URL or local image file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Make Prediction
endpoints.description: Returns a prediction from an image or multi-label model for the specified image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SALESFORCE_API_KEY}} with your SALESFORCE API KEY. Replace {{MODELID}} with a real modelid.
